chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C.P. No.D-1489 of 2022 Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on office objections 2. For hearing of CMA No.5873/2022 3. For hearing of main case. 08.02.2023 Mr. Ali Akber Shar, advocate along with Petitioner Mr. Ali Raza Balouch, AAG along with Ali Ahmed Rajpar, DEO (EH&HS) Khairpur and Abdul Qudoos, Deputy Director, DEPD Department, Sukkur ***************** Pursuant to order dated 19.01.2023, compliance report is submitted by learned AAG while placing on record Sindh Empowerment of Persons with Disabilities Act, 2018, Rules and Committees notified on 8th February, 2019 and 14th February, 2019 and before that there was a board under Social Welfare and Health Department. Accordingly, all departments shall ensure that every candidate on disable quota shall be examined by the committees constituted in 2019 and if certificates are issued would be considered as reliable. Apart from those certificates, they shall not be considered the same. Besides, petitioner shall appear before the committee chaired by Medical Superintendent, Khairpur and that committee shall examine her and issue certificate if she qualifies the definition provided in Sindh Empowerment of persons with disabilities Act, 2018. This exercise shall be completed within 15 days. This order shall be communicated to Chief Secretary, Government of Sindh, all Secretaries of departments for strict compliance and Chairman(s) of all Districts (DRCs). In case of failure, their act shall be prerogative act liable f or criminal proceedings. At this juncture, learned counsel submits photocopy of offer letter alongwith photographs, same is provided to Education officers, who shall verify the same.

In case of failure, their act shall be prerogative act liable f or criminal proceedings. At this juncture, learned counsel submits photocopy of offer letter alongwith photographs, same is provided to Education officers, who shall verify the same. Adjourned to 02.03.2023. JUDGE Faisal Mumtaz/PS JUDGE
